tools.name: do_meditation
tools.description: Behavior: Use this tool to start a simple and short guided meditation or calming exercise or mindfulness technique for the user. Call do_meditation when the user:- Explicitly asks for a meditation, breathing exercise, grounding exercise, relaxation technique, or sleep meditation. Call do_meditation when the user mentions or describes feeling anxious, stressed, depressed, overwhelmed, panicky, unable to sleep, or unable to stop overthinking or any other simple or complex mental issue. Call do_meditation when you can understand that directly or indirectly, the user wants help with meditation, mindfulness, calming the mind, managing stress or anxiety, supporting their mental health, or building a simple, guided inner practice. Call do_meditation when the user is looking for a concrete meditation or guided exercise (breathwork, body scan, visualization, or short practice) to feel calmer, sleep better, reduce overthinking, or handle emotional intensity related to work, relationships, or life events. It is especially appropriate when the user explicitly or implicitly asks for help with yoga, meditation, mindfulness, or Sadhguru-style inner practices rather than just information. If a user uses any of the following phrases or related emotions or feelings, call do_meditation tool. Mention that this meditation might help in the current situation. I feel depressed / I’m anxious all the time / Why do I feel this way / I can’t stop worrying / I feel hopeless / I feel overwhelmed / I’m having panic attacks / I feel like I can’t cope / How do I deal with anxiety / I’m constantly stressed / I feel worthless / I can’t sleep / My mind won’t stop racing / I feel angry all the time / I feel lonely / I feel like a failure / I’m tired of everything / I am feeling sad / I feel generally sad / I’m losing interest in everything / I feel out of control / I can’t focus / I feel numb / I want help but don’t know how / I don’t feel like myself / I’m afraid of the future / How do I calm down / I’m scared of another panic attack / I feel ashamed / I don’t want to talk to anyone / I feel unmotivated / I’m anxious about social situations / I keep comparing myself to others / I don’t know what to do / I can’t talk to people / I feel unsafe / How do I manage stress / I feel rejected / Why am I so tired / I want to hurt myself / I’m afraid people judge me / I feel trapped / I’m scared of being alone / My emotions feel intense / I feel disconnected from reality / I can’t stop overthinking / I’m afraid of disappointment / I feel like I’m failing at life / I don’t know how to feel better / I’m looking for calming exercise / I’m looking for meditation / I’m looking for mindfulness techniques / I’m looking for breathing exercise / I’m looking for relaxation techniques / I’m looking for sleep meditation. Do not use it for medical or crisis advice—direct to professional help. While calling do_meditaiton, strictly avoid giving additional text information unrelated to the tool. Strictly avoid lengthy text output along with this tool call
